empathetic_output.support_response: Our team will definitely do everything we can to assist you in getting your product as soon as possible. Can you kindly provide us with your order number so that we may investigate further and give you an update on when you should expect its arrival?
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out for some help with my order, <PRODUCT>, which was supposed to be delivered a few weeks ago. I ordered <PRODUCT> for my home office and I've been working on the floor for three weeks now, so I'm really eager to get it sorted. I'd really appreciate your help with this, thank you.
